consistency.name: SpikeBiophysicalConsistency
consistency.definition: compatibility of SpikeICSPB with synaptic, dendritic, oscillatory, and population-level biophysical constraints
consistency.formal: BioSpikeICSPB = SynBind + DendInt + PhaseAlign + BurstLocal + PopStable + PlasticGuard

verdict.core_answer: SpikeICSPB is now strongly compatible with a pulse-based biophysical substrate: spikes bind local sections, dendrites integrate admissible evidence, phase windows gate successor transport, and populations stabilize readout.
